abilities.description: When you speak a person's name three times to the wind, roll +wits. On a strong hit, the wind whispers of this person's need. Envision what you hear. If you use this information or fulfill this need when you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel} them, you may reroll any dice (one time only). On a weak hit, as above, but this person's need creates a troubling dilemma or complication; @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} (-1).

As above, and if you score a strong hit when you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel}, you may also reroll any dice (one time only) when you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.13b2d777c6fb719d]{Gather Information} from this person.
When you perform this ritual, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
